questions.scenario: A message arrives: 'Your HDFC account has been flagged. Call 1800-XXX immediately or it will be frozen in 2 hours.'
questions.question: What is your first instinct?

options.text: Call immediately — I don't want to lose access
Forward to family — they'll know what to do
Check if the number is official first
Ignore — banks don't send messages like this

questions.scenario: A senior from your college messages on LinkedIn: 'I referred you for a Google internship. Need your resume + Aadhaar copy ASAP — deadline is today.'
questions.question: How do you respond?

options.text: Send everything — they're a senior I trust
Send resume only — Aadhaar feels too much
Ask them to call first to verify
Check Google's careers page independently

questions.scenario: You get a message: 'You\'ve won ₹10,000 UPI cashback from Paytm. Only 5 slots left to claim!'
questions.question: What runs through your mind?

options.text: Click it quickly before the slots are gone!
Wonder why Paytm is giving free money
It's a scam, delete the message
Check Paytm app directly for offers

questions.scenario: A caller says: 'This is CBI Cyber Cell. A parcel in your name contains illegal substances. Do not disconnect.'
questions.question: How do you react?

options.text: Panic and listen to their instructions
Ask for their ID and official number
Hang up and call 1930 Cyber Helpline
Argue with them that it's a mistake

questions.scenario: Your college WhatsApp group has a message from the Class Rep: 'Emergency fundraiser for a student. 40 people already donated ₹500.'
questions.question: What is your immediate action?

options.text: Donate ₹500 immediately since everyone else did
Wait to see if more friends mention it
Call the Class Rep to confirm before paying
Ignore the message completely

questions.scenario: An app developer emails: 'Thanks for beta testing our app last month! Here is a free ₹500 Amazon voucher code.'
questions.question: How do you proceed?

options.text: Click to claim it — I did help them out
Check if a friend verified this developer
Don't click, search the developer's official site
Mark as spam

questions.scenario: An attractive stranger you've been chatting with on Instagram mentions: 'I lost my wallet, can you UPI me ₹500 for a cab? I\'ll pay tomorrow.'
questions.question: What is your approach?

options.text: Send the money right away to help out
Feel obliged to return a past favor
Suggest they call a friend instead
Block and report the account

questions.scenario: An email about a data science workshop states: '50 of your batchmates already applied. Only 3 seats left for our campus!'
questions.question: What do you do?

options.text: Register instantly so I don't miss out
Register because all my batchmates are going
Check the workshop's actual credibility
Ignore it, probably another paid course
